items: flex grow/shrink have no effect if flex-basis is not set
use flex: flex_grow flex_shrink flex_basis when using flex - how to calculate dimensions of flex items:
Add up the `flex-basis` values of all the flex items.
Subtract this total from the container's width to determine the remaining space.
The remaining space is distributed proportionally according to the `flex-grow` values of the items.
filters create a new stacking context
use 'color-scheme: dark' to set the color of scrollbars
`display: contents` will make a parents children 'break out' of the parent element and behave as children of the grandparent element
